description.value:
The illusionist's hat appears as a tall, black hat with a wide brim and a colorful band around its base. Although popularly associated with themes of magic, this hat is more the province of the entertainer or even the charlatan than of a proper arcanist, and many wizards scoff at those who openly wear such items. You gain a +1 item bonus to Deception checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Create a Diversion] and to Thievery checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Palm an Object].

Activate—What's In My Hat? 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect With a flourish, you remove your hat and sweep it before you. The illusionist's hat casts a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Illusory Creature] to your specifications, save that the creature created must be an animal. As long as you continue to hold your hat in one hand, you can Sustain this illusion as a free action. Unlike with most illusory creatures, you cannot use your actions to speak through the creature.

publication.title: Pathfinder Adventure Path: Bastion of Blasphemies
